/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-aligned-new  -DBRPC_WITH_GLOG=0 -DGFLAGS_NS=google -DBTHREAD_USE_FAST_PTHREAD_MUTEX -D__const__=__unused__ -D_GNU_SOURCE -DUSE_SYMBOLIZE -DNO_TCMALLOC -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -DBRAFT_REVISION=\"5de766e\" -D__STRICT_ANSI__ -g -O2 -pipe -Wall -W -fPIC -fstrict-aliasing -Wno-invalid-offsetof -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-reserved-user-defined-literal -fno-omit-frame-pointer -DNDEBUG -O2 -D__const__=__unused__ -pipe -W -Wall -Wno-unused-parameter -fPIC -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/braft_cli.dir/braft_cli.cpp.o -o output/bin/braft_cli  -Xlinker "-(" ../output/lib/libbraft.a /usr/local/lib/libbrpc.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libleveldb.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl -lz -lrt -Xlinker "-)"
